Uxolo
Isikhangeli sakho asixhasi iWebAudio.
Izikhangeli ezixhaswayo yiChrome, Firefox, Safari, neEdge

settings.title: Useto

engines.bassoonDesc: Ixhasa kuphela .xm / .mod. Ibuyela umva kwi-Chiptune3 emva koko i-FFmpeg kwezinye iifomathi.
engines.ffmpegDesc: Iguqulela zonke iifomathi zomsindo zibe yiMP3. Inkxaso ebanzi, ukuqala okucothayo.
engines.chiptune3Desc: Ixhasa iifomathi ye-tracker ezingaphezu kwama-20 (.xm/.mod/.it/.s3m/.mptm/.umx …). Ibuyela umva kwi-FFmpeg kwezinye iifomathi.

settings.engineDesc: Khetha eyona injini yomsindo oza kuyisebenzisa. I-Chiptune3 iyacetyiswa ukuze kufumaneke inkxaso engcono yefomathi ye-tracker.

intro.title: Isikhokelo

tutorialMock.annotPlaylist: Cofa nawuphi umqolo ukuze uqalise ukudlala · Umqolo ngamnye ubonisa: inombolo · isihloko · ifomathi · iitshaneli · ubungakanani · igama lefayile
tutorialMock.labelFormatFilter: Cofa “Fometha” ukuze uvule iphaneli yokukhetha ezininzi · Izihluzi zokuhla kweChannel/Size · Uhlobo lwemihlaba emininzi

intro.tutorialStep4Title: 4. Ukwenza Amava Akho Abe Ngokwezifiso Zakho
intro.tutorialStep3Title: 3. Ukubonwa okuphilayo — Umbono wePateni kunye neeOscilloscopes
intro.tutorialStep3Body: Tracker Player izisa umculo ebomini ngemiboniso emibini ehambelanayo yexesha lokwenyani:
intro.tutorialStep5Body: Yenza i-akhawunti yasimahla ukuze uvule iimpawu ezongezelelweyo:
intro.introWelcome: Isango lakho lokonwabela umculo we-tracker kwiifomathi ezingaphezu kwama-68 — ukusuka kwi-MOD ne-XM ezidumileyo ukuya kwi-MPTM ne-UMX zale mihla — ukusuka kwingqokelela enkulu e
intro.tutorialLead: Esi sikhokelo sikukhokela kuzo zonke iimpawu zeTracker Player, ukusuka ekufumaneni ingoma yakho yokuqala ukuya ekulungiseleleni umdlali ngokomsebenzi wakho.
intro.tutorialStep6Tip: Icebiso: Kwiselfowuni, yongeza iTracker Player kwiscreen sakho sasekhaya ukuze ufumane amava afana ne-app yendalo. Isebenza kakuhle njengeProgressive Web App ene-offline caching.
intro.tutorialStep4Body: Tracker Player inokwazi ukulungiselelwa ngokwezifiso. Fikelela useto nge icon yegiya (ibha ephezulu) okanye nge ndlela yeSeto (icala lasekhohlo):
intro.tutorialStep2Body: Cofa nawuphi umkhondo kuluhlu lokudlala ukuze uqalise ukudlala. Isidlali silayisha ngoko nangoko — uninzi lweefayile ziqala ukudlala ngaphantsi komzuzwana. Ngeli xesha umkhondo udlala, uya kubona:
intro.tutorialStep1Body: Uluhlu lokudlala yintliziyo yeTracker Player. Sebenzisa ibha yokukhangela phezulu ukufumana iingoma ngegama lefayile okanye isihloko. Ngaphantsi kwebha yokukhangela, uya kufumana isethi yezihluzi ezinamandla:
intro.introWhatBody1: Tracker Player yiprojekthi yomntu ovulekileyo enikezelwe ekuziseni umtsalane womculo we-tracker kwisikhangeli sanamhlanje. Ayisiyiyo injini yomsindo entsha, kodwa kukudityaniswa okunzulu kunye nophuhliso lwesibini olwakhiwe phezu kweeprojekthi ezikhoyo ezivulekileyo, ukudala inkqubo epheleleyo yamava omsebenzisi.
intro.introWelcomeNote: I-Tracker Player ingaphezulu nje komdlali — iyindawo yomculo we-tracker enezinto ezipheleleyo, enesimo esihle nesabelayo, umboniso wepateni ngexesha lokwenyani, ii-oscilloscope zomjelo ngamnye, kunye neseti yezixhobo ezenzelwe ukwenza ukufumanisa nokonwabela umculo we-tracker kube lula kuso nasiphi na isixhobo.
intro.introTrackerBody3: Kude kube namhlanje, umculo we-tracker uyaqhubeka nokukhula phakathi koluntu lwe-demoscene yehlabathi kunye nabathandi bekhompyutha zakudala. I-Tracker Player inethemba lokwazisa abantu abaninzi kolu hlobo lobugcisa olukhethekileyo oluthwele imbali yomculo wekhompyutha, ngokusebenzisa ujongano lwanamhlanje kunye nonxibelelwano olulula.
intro.tutorialStep6Body: Yonke ingoma kwiTracker Player inesixhobo esisisigxina, esinokwabelwana nge-URL. Khuphela ikhonkco kwibha yedilesi yesikhangeli sakho ngelixa ingoma idlala — iya kujongeka ngathi /song/123456/filename.mod. Yithumele kubahlobo, uyiposte kumajelo ezentlalo, okanye uyibhukmakhe ukuze uyisebenzise kamva. Ikhonkco liya kuhlala livula ingoma enye.
intro.changelogIntro: Tracker Player iye wakhula kakhulu ukusuka kwimvelaphi yayo njengomdlali olula we-MOD/XM. Nantsi ixesha leziganeko eziphambili:
intro.introWhatBody3: Ukusuka ekukhangeni nokucoca uluhlu lweengoma, ukubonwa komsindo, iinkqubo zeakhawunti yomsebenzisi ukuya kwinkxaso yamazwe ngamazwe, iTracker Player yakhe inkqubo epheleleyo yeempawu ezingaphandle ezijikeleze umongo womdlali, ngenjongo yokuvumela abasebenzisi bonwabele umtsalane okhethekileyo womculo we-tracker ngaphandle kwaso nasiphi na isiseko sobugcisa.
intro.creditsVueDesc: Isakhelo seJavaScript esiqhubekayo esisetyenziselwa i-UI yethu esekwe kumacandelo. I-Vue's Composition API, inkqubo yokuphendula, kunye namacandelo efayile enye yenza kwenzeke ukwakha nokugcina ujongano lomdlali oluntsonkothileyo ngekhowudi ecocekileyo, enemodyuli.
intro.creditsBassoonDesc: Yenziwe nguSteffest. Ukuphinda kusetyenziswe ngokuthembekileyo kwi-browser-based reimplementation ye-classic Amiga MOD kunye ne-XM trackers — i-ProTracker kunye ne-FastTracker II — ebhalwe ngokupheleleyo ngeJavaScript. I-BassoonTracker inika i-authentic, warm playback eyaqala le projekthi, ngenkxaso epheleleyo ye-classic 4-channel MODs kunye ne-multi-channel XMs equka i-envelopes, i-filters, kunye ne-effects.
intro.creditsIntro: Tracker Player yakhelwe phezu kwamagxa e-ecosystem evulekileyo emangalisayo. Yonke i-track library yethu engaphezu kwe-135,400+ ifunyenwe kwi-The Mod Archive — indawo egcina umculo we-tracker kwi-intanethi. Siyabulela kakhulu kubo bonke abanikeli abenze lo msebenzi waba nokwenzeka.
intro.creditsNuxtDesc: I-Vue.js meta-framework eqhuba yonke i-frontend kunye ne-backend yethu. I-Nuxt ibonelela ngokunikezela nge-server-side rendering ukuze kulayishwe amaphepha ngokukhawuleza kunye ne-SEO, i-Nitro server yeendlela ze-API, ukudityaniswa kwesiseko sedatha se-SQLite, kunye nokwahlulwa kwekhowudi ngokuzenzekelayo ukuze kusebenze kakuhle.
intro.introWhatBody2Tail: , i-tracker ye-Amiga MOD/XM esekwe kwisikhangeli, ebhalwe nge-JavaScript ecocekileyo ngu-Steffest, ephinda idlala ngokuthembekileyo amava okuphulaphula i-tracker yakudala. Isakhelo kule siseko, iprojekthi ngokuthe ngcembe yadibanisa i-Chiptune3 (i-injini ye-WebAssembly eyenzelwe umsebenzisi esekwe kwi-libopenmpt) kunye nokuguqulwa kwecala leseva ye-FFmpeg, yandisa inkxaso yefomathi ukusuka kwi-MOD/XM yokuqala ukuya kwiifomathi ezingaphezu kwama-68.
intro.creditsWebGLDesc: I-API yegraphics yebrowser evelisa umbono wepateni yethu yokulandelela ngexesha lokwenyani. Idatha yamanqaku epateni ihanjiswa kwi-canvas yeWebGL nge-60 fps, ivelisa ngokuthembekileyo inkangeleko yamanqaku ajikelezayo yabahleli be-tracker abaqhelekileyo abafana ne-ProTracker ne-FastTracker II.
intro.creditsEmscriptenDesc: Ithuluzi lokuhlanganisa elisekwe kwi-LLVM elihlanganisa ikhowudi ye-C/C++ ibe yi-WebAssembly. Sisebenzisa i-Emscripten ukuhlanganisa i-libopenmpt yethu elungisiweyo — kuquka ne-waveform_processor eyenzelwe umsebenzisi — ibe yimodyuli ye-WASM yefayile enye esebenza ngesantya esiphantse sibe sesiqhelo ngaphakathi kwe-AudioWorklet yesikhangeli.
intro.introTrackerBody1: Umculo weTracker (okwaziwa nangokuthi umculo wemodyuli okanye umculo weMOD) luhlobo olukhethekileyo lomculo wedijithali olwavela ekupheleni kweminyaka yoo-1980 kwiCommodore Amiga. Ngokungafaniyo neeMP3 okanye umculo osasazwa ngokuhamba kwexesha, iifayile zomculo weTracker ziqukethe zombini amanqaku omculo (amanqaku, iipateni, iziphumo) kunye neesampulu zezixhobo zomculo — njengefayile yeprojekthi yomculo ezimeleyo. Oku kwenza iifayile zomculo weTracker zibe zincinci ngokuphawulekayo ngelixa zivumela ubunzima obumangalisayo bomculo.
intro.creditsModArchiveDesc: Indawo yokuqala ye-intanethi yomculo olandelwayo, egcina iimodyuli ezingaphezu kwe-150,000 ezivela kumawakawaka abaculi kwiinkulungwane ezine zeminyaka. I-Mod Archive ngumthombo wodwa womculo okwithala lethu lethala kwaye liziko elingenakutshintshwa kuluntu lwabalandeli bomculo olandelwayo.
intro.creditsTailwindDesc: Isakhelo se-CSS esisebenzisa izinto zokuqala eziluncedo ezisetyenziselwa ukwenza uyilo. Inkqubo ye-Tailwind yamathokheni oyilo yenza ukuba i-16-theme architecture yethu isebenze — yonke imibala, isithunzi, kunye nomda uyazilungisa kumxholo osebenzayo ngokusebenzisa iimpawu ze-CSS ezenziweyo ezivela kulungiselelo lwethu lwe-Tailwind.
intro.creditsAudioWorkletDesc: Inkcazo ye-W3C Web Audio API evumela ukusetyenzwa komsindo ongenasiphithiphithi, ongenaziphazamiso kumtya wexesha lokwenyani ozinikeleyo. I-AudioWorklet kulapho i-Chiptune3 engine yethu iqhuba i-libopenmpt WASM ehlanganisiweyo, ngaphandle koxhomekeko kumtya oyintloko we-UI, iqinisekisa ukudlala okugudileyo nokuba yeyiphi na imisebenzi ye-interface.
intro.introTrackerBody2: Ifomathi yasungulwa nguKarsten Obarski's Ultimate Soundtracker ngo-1987, yaza yakhula ngokukhawuleza nge-demoscene — inkcubeko ephilileyo apho abaprogram, iimvumi, kunye namagcisa akhuphisana ukuze benze imisebenzi ebonakalayo nemnandi. Kule minyaka ingamashumi, iifomathi ezininzi ze-tracker zavela, nganye inyusa imida yoko kwakunokwenzeka: iitshaneli ezininzi, iziphumo ezingcono, izixhobo ezihlanganisiweyo, inkxaso ye-VST plugin, kunye namandla okuxuba ngokupheleleyo. Namhlanje, i-tracker scene ihlala isebenza kwihlabathi liphela, kunye nomculo omtsha okhutshwa yonke imihla kwiindawo ezinje ngeThe Mod Archive.
intro.creditsChiptune3Desc: Yenziwe nguDrSnuggles — incwadi yolwazi ye-JavaScript evulekileyo esonga i-libopenmpt kwi-AudioWorklet ukuze idlalwe kwisikhangeli seefomathi ezingaphezu kwama-68. Kule projekthi, siye sayilungisa i-AudioWorklet processor ukuze ikhuphe idatha yamaza ejikelezayo (enika amandla ii-oscilloscope ezinamajelo amaninzi), songeza ulawulo lwamandla oluzenzekelayo, saza saqinisa ukuphathwa kweemeko zokhuphiswano ukuze kutshintshwe iingoma ngokukhawuleza. I-Chiptune3 isebenza njengebhulorho phakathi kwe-Web Audio API yesikhangeli kunye namandla okuguqula iikhowudi ze-libopenmpt yethu elungisiweyo, kwaye yinjini yethu ephakanyisiweyo esisiseko.
intro.creditsLibopenmptDesc: Iphuhliswe ngabaxhasi be-OpenMPT. Ithala leencwadi lokudlala elivulekileyo eliyinkokeli, elixhasa iifomathi ezingaphezu kwama-68 eemodyuli ngokuchaneka okungenakuthelekiswa nanto. Siguqule ikhowudi yomthombo ka-C ye-libopenmpt — songeza i-waveform_processor eyenzelwe ukuthatha idatha ye-PCM yesitishi ngasinye ngaphakathi kumxubi ngaphambi kokukhutshwa kokugqibela — saye sayiqulunqa kwi-WebAssembly nge-Emscripten. I-WASM yethu elungisiweyo ithatha indawo yebhayinari ehlanganisiweyo yangaphambili efakwe kwi-Chiptune3, inika amandla ii-oscilloscope zesitishi ngasinye kwaye yenza umgogodla wokuguqula iifomathi ezingaphezu kwama-68.
tutorialStep1Filters: Isihluzo seFomethi — Cofa ukuze uvule igridi yokukhetha ezininzi yeefomethi ezikhoyo. Sebenzisa amaqhosha asetiweyo ukukhetha ngokukhawuleza amaqela: iBassoon (MOD/XM), iMajor Tracker (MOD/XM/IT/S3M/MPTM), iChiptune3 All (iifomethi ezingama-56), okanye zonke eziXhaswayo.
Isihluzo seetshaneli — Cutha ngokwenani leetshaneli: iitshaneli ezi-4 (ixesha le-MOD yakudala), iitshaneli ezi-8, okanye iitshaneli ezi-8+ (i-multitrack yanamhlanje).
Isihluzo soBungakanani — Hlula ngobungakanani befayile: incinci (<100KB), ephakathi, okanye enkulu (>1MB).
Isihluzo seGama leTracker — Chwetheza igama le-tracker (umzekelo, "Impulse Tracker", "FastTracker") ukufumana umculo owenziwe ngesoftware ethile.
Iinketho zokuhlela — Hlela uluhlu lwengoma nge-ID, isihloko, igama lefayile, ubungakanani, okanye umhla wokulungiswa, ngokunyuka okanye ngokuhla.
Umkhethi woMthombo — Tshintsha phakathi kweengoma eziZonke, iiFavorites zakho, kunye neMbali yakho yokuDlala.
tutorialStep2Details: Ulwazi lwengoma — Isihloko, umculi, ifomathi, inani leziteshi, kunye nenombolo yengoma eboniswe ngaphezulu kwezilawuli zomdlali.

Ukudlala/Ukuyekisa & Ukuhamba — Iqhosha elikhulu lokudlala/ukuyekisa elinokukhetha indlela yokudlala: Ukuxuba (ngokungacwangciswanga), Ngokulandelelana (ngokulandelelana), Ukujikeleza enye, okanye Ukuyeka emva kwangoku.
Ingoma elandelayo — Tsibela kwingoma elandelayo ngesandla, okanye vumela indlela yakho yokudlala ekhethiweyo iyilawule.
Ivolumu & Inkcazo — Lungisa ivolumu ngesilayidi, khangela ingoma, kwaye ubone ixesha elidlulileyo/eliseleyo.
Iqhosha lokuthanda — Cofa intliziyo ukongeza ingoma kwiifavorites zakho (kufuna iakhawunti).
Khuphela — Gcina ifayile yoqondiso yoqobo kwisixhobo sakho.
Ikhonkco leModArchive — Vula iphepha lengoma kwiModArchive ukuze ufumane umxholo owongezelelweyo kunye nezimvo zoluntu.

Imowadi yeengcaciso zomkhondo — Jonga i metadata eneenkcukacha: igama lomkhondo, umhla, ubude bexesha, uhlobo lomphathi, iingoma ezingaphantsi, inani leziteshi, izixhobo zomculo, iisampulu, ii-oda, iipateni, kunye nalo naluphi na umyalezo ofakwe ngaphakathi ovela kumqambi.
tutorialStep3Details: Umbono wePateni — Jonga idatha yepateni yomkhondo iskrola ngexesha lokwenyani, iboniswe ngeWebGL ukuze isebenze kakuhle ngokugudileyo. Ikholamu nganye imele itshaneli, umqolo ngamnye sisiganeko senowuthi. Amanowuthi, izixhobo zomculo, ivolyum, kunye nemiyalelo yeziphumo ziboniswa zonke — njengakumhleli wepateni wakudala. Cofa ukutshintsha kwepateni ukuze utshintshe phakathi kwezakhiwo ezithe nkqo (zemveli) nezithe tye (isikrini esibanzi).

Ii-Oscilloscopes zeSiteshi ngasinye — Ngaphantsi komdlali, uya kubona igridi yemiboniso ye-waveform — enye yesiteshi ngasinye somsindo kwitreyi. Ezi zixhaswa ngumqhubi we-waveform wethu we-C-level owenziwe ngokwezifiso owakhelwe kwi-libopenmpt, ekhupha umsindo wesiteshi ngasinye ngaphambi komxube wokugqibela. Jonga i-waveform yesiteshi ngasinye iskrola ngexesha lokwenyani, ikunika umkhondo obonakalayo wendlela umculo owakhiwe ngayo — ikick drum kwisiteshi 1, i-bass kwisiteshi 2, i-lead kwisiteshi 3, njalo njalo.
Zombiniwe zombini eziyimiboniso zinokuvulwa/kuvalwa kwi-Settings ngenxa yokusebenza okanye ukhetho.
tutorialStep4Settings: Iinjini yokuDlala — Khetha phakathi kweBassoonTracker (i-MOD/XM yakudala), iChiptune3 (ecetyiswayo, iifomathi ezingaphezu kwama-20), okanye iFFmpeg (inkxaso ebanzi yeefomathi ngokusebenzisa uguqulo lwecala leseva).

Umxholo — Khetha kwimixholo yemibala eyi-16. Imixholo ekhanyayo ibandakanya i-Light, i-Retro (Solarized), i-Ocean (Teal), i-Forest (Green), i-Strawberry (Pink), i-Blue, i-Pink, i-Cyan, i-Orange, kunye ne-Gray. Imixholo emnyama ibandakanya i-Dark, i-Midnight (Deep Purple), i-Golden (Black & Gold), i-Purple, i-Red, kunye ne-Green.
ULwimi — Iilwimi ezingama-52 zojongano. Ukhetho lwakho lugcinwa kwindawo yakho.
Umthamo — Cwangcise inqanaba lomthamo olungagungqiyo kwaye unyanzelise ukuba libekho kuyo yonke ingoma ukuba uyafuna.
UkuLungisa uMgangatho weSandi — Lungisa ngokuzenzekelayo umthamo wokudlala ukuze umamele ngokungaguqukiyo (ivuliwe ngokungagqibekanga).
Ubungu lokuphinda oluphezulu — Iingoma zeTracker zihlala ziphinda ngokungenasiphelo. Cwangcisa ubungu lokuphinda oluphezulu ukuthintela ukudlala okungenasiphelo (okuzenzekelayo: 1).
Izinto zokutshintsha umboniso — Bonisa okanye fihla umboniso wobubanzi, umboniso wepatheni, kunye necandelo lentshayelelo.
tutorialStep5Details: Izinto ozithandayo — Cofa intliziyo kuyo nayiphi na ingoma ukuyigcina kuluhlu lwezinto ozithandayo, ezinokufikeleleka kumkhethi womthombo wohlu lweengoma.
Imbali yokuDlala — Yonke ingoma oyidlalayo irekhodwa ngokuzenzekelayo. Khangela imbali yakho ukuze uphinde ufumane iingoma.
Ungqamaniso lweZixhobo eziNqamlezileyo — Izinto ozithandayo kunye nembali yakho ziyakulandela kuzo zonke izixhobo xa ungena ngemvume.
Ubumeli — I-akhawunti yakho igcina kuphela izinto ozithandayo kunye nembali. Akukho datha yobuqu iqokelelwayo okanye yabelwana ngayo.

items: Integrated libopenmpt as a third playback engine, supporting 68+ tracker formats with bit-accurate playback.
Developed custom waveform_processor in C — modifications to libopenmpt's source code enabling per-channel audio extraction before final mixing.
Compiled libopenmpt + waveform_processor to WebAssembly via Emscripten for in-browser execution.
Built WebGL-based pattern view with both vertical (traditional tracker) and horizontal (widescreen) display modes.
Added per-channel oscilloscope visualization — live scrolling waveforms for each audio channel, powered by the custom waveform processor.
Created adaptive font sizing and pixel-perfect text rendering in WebGL visualizer.
Implemented hard clipping protection to prevent uint8 texture overflow in waveform visualizers.
Added multi-channel signal normalization and noise gating for cleaner oscilloscope displays.
Fixed timing drift in Chiptune3 AudioWorklet for rock-solid playback synchronization.
Expanded format support to 56 formats in Chiptune3 + additional formats in libopenmpt.
Added user account system with registration, login, and favorites/history sync.
Added track info modal with comprehensive metadata display.
Added download modal — download original tracker files or convert to MP3.
Added horizontal layout mode for pattern display (transposed channel and row data).
Added theme-specific row highlight alpha variables for WebGL shader backgrounds.
Developed Chiptune3 — a custom WebAssembly audio engine supporting 20+ tracker formats with per-channel output.
Implemented AudioWorklet-based playback for low-latency, glitch-free audio.
Built dual-canvas oscilloscope system — spectrum analyzer (frequency domain) and waveform display (time domain).
Added WebGL rendering pipeline for high-performance visualizations.
Introduced 16 color themes with CSS custom properties and runtime switching.
Built the ear-bar sidebar (InfoDrawer) with 5 panels: Guide, Settings, Theme, Language, Account.
Added 52-language internationalization system with locale detection and fallback chains.
Implemented responsive mobile layout with safe-area support and collapsible navigation.
Added playlist search, format filter panel with preset buttons, and multi-field sort.
Built pagination controls with first/prev/-10/+10/next/last navigation.
Initial release as 'MOD Player' — a web-based player for MOD and XM tracker music.
Integrated BassoonTracker by Steffest as the core playback engine — browser-based Amiga tracker in JavaScript.
Built playlist interface with table view showing track number, title, and filename.
Added basic playback controls: play, pause, next, playback mode selection.
Created Settings panel with volume control, max loop setting, and display toggles.
Implemented local storage for user preferences (theme, language, settings).
Added introductory guide section explaining what tracker music is and how to use the player.
Sourced initial music library from CoolModFiles.com and The Mod Archive.
Designed the responsive layout foundation: header, player column, playlist column, footer.
Added dark and light theme support with CSS custom properties.

introFeatures: Ithala leefayile zomculo we-tracker ezingaphezu kwe-135,400 ezihlanganisa iifomathi ezingaphezu kwama-68, ukusuka kwii-MOD ezinamajelo ama-4 ukuya kwii-epics ezinamajelo angama-256.

Uyilo lwe-injini ezintathu: iBassoonTracker (i-JS yakudala), iChiptune3 (i-AudioWorklet + i-libopenmpt WASM), kunye ne-FFmpeg (ukuguqula ikhowudi kwicala leseva) — ikhethwa ngokuzenzekelayo kwifayile nganye.
Umboniso womkhondo wexesha lokwenyani owenziwe ngeWebGL — jonga amanqaku esihla njengakumhleli womkhondo wakudala.
Ii-oscilloscope zamaza esinye isitishi — bona imveliso yomsindo yesinye isitishi njenge-waveform ephilayo ekhululayo, enikwe amandla kukukhutshwa kwe-waveform okwenziwe ngokwezifiso kwinqanaba le-C.
Uyilo oluphendulayo oluziqhelanisa kakuhle naso nasiphi na isikrini: ideskithophu, ithebhulethi, okanye ifowuni — kuquka imo yepateni ethe tye yesikrini esibanzi.
I-16 imixholo yemibala eyilungiselelwe ngobunono — ukusuka ekukhanyeni okucacileyo ukuya ebusuku obunzulu, i-solarized retro, igolide efudumeleyo, nayo yonke into ephakathi.
Iilwimi ezingama-52 zojongano lwenkqubo — ukwenza umculo we-tracker ufikeleleke kubaphulaphuli kwihlabathi liphela.

Uphando olunamandla, isihluzi sefomathi yokukhetha ezininzi enamaqhosha asetiweyo (iBassoon, iMajor Tracker, iChiptune3, zonke eziXhaswayo), isihluzi sokubala kwesitishi, kunye nohlobo lwemihlaba emininzi.
Inkqubo ye-akhawunti enezinto ozithandayo kunye nembali yokudlala — vumelanisa ithala lakho leencwadi kuzo zonke izixhobo zakho.
Amakhonkco eengoma ekwabelwana ngawo ngokusisigxina — ingoma nganye ifumana i-URL eyodwa efana ne /song/123456/filename.mod.
Khuphela iifayile zomkhondo zentsusa okanye ziguqulele kwi-MP3 ngokucofa nje kube kanye.
Iphaneli yolwazi lwengoma ebonisa imethadatha: isihloko, umculi, umkhondo, ifomathi, iitshaneli, izixhobo, iisampulu, ii-oda, iipateni, kunye nomyalezo ofakwe ngaphakathi.
Isimahla ngokupheleleyo, umthombo ovulekileyo, kwaye uqhutywa luluntu — akukho zibhengezo, akukho kulandelelwa, akukho zindonga zentlawulo.
